title: Counter Variations
description: Extend a counter with step control using Math.max/min, reset, multiple counters, and double/triple increment buttons.
checklist: Use Math.max or Math.min to clamp count or step
Add reset button to return count to 0
Render multiple counter instances or values
Add double (+2) and triple (+3) increment actions

hints.guide: // guide hints: Import: React, and useState from react
// guide hints: Use Math.max or Math.min to clamp count or step
// guide hints: Support configurable step increment
// guide hints: Add reset button to return count to 0
// guide hints: Render multiple counter instances or values
// guide hints: Add double (+2) and triple (+3) increment actions
hints.code:
const incrementDouble = () => setCount(count + 2);
  const incrementTriple = () => setCount(count + 3);

hints.guide: // guide hints: Export: export default CounterComponent;
